title: Pumpkin eve
description: It adds some new biomes and some unique plants. Some foods will be added soon.
body:
# What's the mod?
The Eveland, a fresh biome with its varied plants and bone blocks. Fragrant flowers decorate the land, captivating the eye. New foods which have nutrition and culinary uses is added. Eveland's charm lies in its beauty, biodiversity.![The Eveland](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad8efe5da70e167a6c36181b1108003b8bd6820e.png)
![The Eveland with many bone blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f0834f9bdb2d9c050495638253a35e9bf2e3ee7.png)
## The Eveland
This biome grows in warm, humid areas between deserts and tropical grasslands. Its soil has a reddish-orange color that complements the desert-style buildings. It's a peaceful place where foxes and cats thrive, enhancing its charming and serene ambiance.
## The orchberbs
Eveland offers a rich variety of plants, including the fascinating pumpkin arboret. Exploring this biome enhances the speed and agility of travelers, enabling them to move faster.![The pumpkin arboret](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7ff2d332831d774812b7143d72d8eb4b021871e.png)
## What's more
More features are undergoing testing. Stay tuned for further updates!
